descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 7-3 in Centennial Cup semifinal game.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes scored five first-period goals to defeat the Red Deer Rustlers 7-3 on April 16, 1987, squaring their western Centennial Cup semifinal at three wins each. The B.C. Junior Hockey League champions led 5-1 after the first period and 5-3 after the second, outshooting the Alberta junior champions 36-33. Rob Clarke scored three goals; Tony Bobbitt, Dave Tomlinson, Brian Kozak, and Mike McCormick added single goals.
